programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: When Gilligan finds an old airplane hidden in the jungle, the castaways discover a long-forgotten aviator who lives on the island.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The castaways hold elections to decide who shall be the leader of the island.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When her home cooking isn't enough to win over her crush, Mama turns to aping Naomi's seductive body language to attract his affections.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The Harper family is asked to watch the grandson of the Reverend and Mrs. Meechum, an eight-year-old brat who pushes Mama over the edge.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A friend's wife makes passes at Doc; a man records his friend's romances; an engaged woman meets an old school chum.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy pays attention to a fatherless new boy in town, which makes Opie jealous.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Voice actor and puppeteer Wally Wingert has a joyful obsession with the pop culture of the '60s through the 1980s, so much so that he's turned his Los Angeles home into what he calls "Wallywood": a virtual musem of treasures including Jack Lord's "Hawaii 5-O" ensemble (complete with height-enhancing boots), the actual passport of Ed McMahon (Wally's predecessor as "Tonight Show" announcer), the very first licensed Kermit puppet (from before he was even a frog), and the iconic stage costume of comedy legend Andy Kaufman... plus so much more! Lisa's invited "Collector's Call" favorite Rob Klein to put a value on Wally's entire collection... then to try to tempt him into a trade, an offer that comes down to a very small piece of colored resin with a very big '60s TV connection!"

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp is under fire and is swamped with wounded. They are being attacked by their own artillery in a frightening "friendly fire" incident. After Trapper and Margaret get trapped in the supply tent together, Frank's jealousy of Trapper drives him to propose to Margaret.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Camp activities include Henry's nervous delivery of a sex lecture, with Hawkeye and Trapper heckling, a Shirley Temple movie and a cookout.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike is set to go down to the blood bank to donate some blood and asks Archie if he would like to donate. Dead set against it, Archie refuses to donate blood because he's afraid that his vital fluids might get mixed in with those of a different race. After some coaxing, Mike gets Archie to come to the blood bank, but Archie takes one look at some blood and passes out.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Roger, a friend of Mike and Gloria's, stops by for a visit. Archie takes one look at him and labels him as gay due to what Archie considers effeminate behavior, even though Mike insists that he isn't. Mike soon makes a realization that one of Archie's drinking buddies, Steve is actually a well-adjusted, sports loving, straight-acting, gay man.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria comes home from the doctor with some news: she's pregnant. This leads to a big argument between Archie and Mike so Mike decides to quit school and move out. Archie doesn't believe him, that is until Mike gets a job in Detroit and plans on moving there. However, plans for a move are suddenly halted when Gloria suffers a miscarriage.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.sub-title: Mike's Hippie Friends Come To Visit
programme.desc: Just before leaving on a flight to Europe, Mike's hippie friends need a place to stay for the night. Mike invites them to stay in the Bunker's living room, however, Archie objects citing that no unmarried couple will spend the night together under his roof. But a night of arguing begins to take its toll on everyone, as the fighting begins to stretch into the early morning hours.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Torchy Song, the gang parodies the classic film, with Carol playing a demanding Joan Crawford on a warpath.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Mrs. Wiggins / Stop Grabbing My Jewels
programme.desc: In Mrs. Wiggins, Mr. Tudball plans a secret party for Mrs. Wiggins, who per usual, doesn't understand. Then, in Stop Grabbing My Jewels, Tim tries to steal a priceless diamond, with explosive results.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob, Buddy and Sally let their egos get the best of them when a reporter is going to interview them.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: An opportunistic old friend causes problems for Rob.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ed sells irons after Ralph's advice got him fired from the sewer. When Ed lies about how much money he's making so that the Kramdens don't feel bad, Ralph considers selling irons, too.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A former KGB officer trying to defect finds himself trapped in a room with a bomb—and three hours before it detonates.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.sub-title: Forecast: Low Clouds And Coastal Fog (s1, ep)
programme.desc: A lady is plunged into a nightmare after she refuses to help a man and his badly beaten girlfriend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The propaganda minister of Suroq, Vassier, is preparing to pardon Ismet El Kabir, a ruthless terrorist whom he secretly supports. The IMF must make sure El Kabir is never released.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble happens to watch a TV debate in which a once-renowned attorney, named G. Stanley Lazer, claims that he could reverse Kimble's criminal conviction if the case went back to trial. Lazer once a respected lawyer, had his license revoked after getting i

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "Pressed into service by the police, Harry Orwell must protect an eyewitness against attempts to assassinate her before she can testify against a murderer."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon learn that a young man has called his mother from Hollywood "to say goodbye." With the help of the man's sister, the two detectives trace the impending suicide to a hotel with more than 1,200 rooms.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Petty theft from drug and hardware stores leads to a group of four teens who are determined to start their own nation on a remote island off the California coast.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While transporting a burglar to the station with Malloy's assistance, Sgt. MacDonald strikes and kills a jaywalker with his cruiser, but unfortunately all of the witnesses on the sidewalk inexplicably claim she was in the crosswalk. With the burglar unmotivated to testify on MacDonald's behalf, Malloy has to take it upon himself to clear his boss.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and reed try to curb a chronic street racing problem by befriending the club leaders and working with a racing promoter to open a legitimate drag strip. Their efforts, along with a highly anticipated race between reed and officer wells, are put in

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony continue their Trekkin' All 50 tour of the United States with a visit to Minnesota."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: While his class is reciting a poem about trees, Beaver remembers a tree that Ward had given him for his birthday when they lived at their old house. Wanting "his" tree back, Beaver and Larry go to Beaver's old home and promptly dig it up.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver gets a surprise when June invites Miss Landers over for dinner and Larry convinces him that something bad might happen. This leads Beaver to become a nervous wreck as he tries to make sure his parents don't do anything to embarrass him. Meanwhile, Larry charges a quarter to anyone who wants to spy on Miss Landers eating dinner at the Cleavers.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: After the death of her husband and partner, Joe Doyle, Constant Doyle takes on a case involving a young man who knew her husband. She asks for Mason's help and he suggests she hire the Paul Drake Detective agency.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock tries to figure out whether the archbishop was meant to die in a plot involving an ex-football player, his wife, her lover and the mafia.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: It seems that a serial killer has been burying his victims in a wooded area owned by a wealthy hermit that Virgil refers to as "Sparta's Howard Hughes". Suspicion immediately falls on an eccentric woman who lives in the woods with her pigs and chases away trespassers with a shotgun. The officers ask the landowner's disturbed son for help and Bubba is surprised to find that a woman he attended high school with is working as the man's "nurse". Also Parker and Sweet compete with one another to solve the case.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John Boy falls in love with Jenny Pendelton.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "An old prospector named Obie Tater causes trouble for himself, his bride, and Matt when he refuses to tell where his fortune of gold is hidden."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Little Timmy Wyatt witnesses a series of bizarre murders. He has a habit of telling tall tales, so no one will believe him."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben falls for Claire Amory but her invalid brother might end up tossing a monkey wrench into the romance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is forced to give refuge to Will Fulton, a young bank robber who was injured while saving Mark's life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Micah Torrance, a once famous lawman, is introduced as a drunken derelict who stumbles into North Fork. Micah, nursing an arm crippled in a gunfight, is hired by Lucas to help out at the ranch. Three outlaws ride into town looking for revenge against Micah.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "A blind man called Sangre has joined the wagon train along with his guide. He is actually Coop's boyhood blood brother Richard Bloodgood, and he openly states his plan to kill Coop. Coop gets very hostile and refuses to discuss it whenever Charlie or Barnaby ask the reason Richard wants to kill him, but they know it has to do with the death of a beautiful woman long ago."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Johnny tries to win a ticket-selling contest. Dr. Backett blames himself when he is involved in a car accident that leaves the other driver dead and The driver's daughter refuses to speak. While repairing the squad, the paramedics find themselves in the middle of a shootout and treat a policeman with heart trouble. A boxcar full of ammonia complicates a fire on a pier.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Dr. Borelli visits the 4077th to demonstrate his artery transplant technique. Unfortunately, being so close to the front at the 4077th causes Borelli's drinking problem to interfere at the worst time—when a patient needs the transplant.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye hits Major Burns and Houlihan is a witness. Despite Hawkeye and Trapper's claims that it wasn't intentional, Frank makes allegations against Hawkeye, and he is put in house arrest facing court martial. A female colonel is sent to inspect the nurses. When she cries "Rape!" when Burns visits her tent, Houlihan recants her story, and Burns, not Hawkeye, ends up under house arrest.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye, Houlihan and Klinger go to an aid station at the front. Working closely together under heavy fire and unsanitary medical conditions, the three return to camp with new found respect for one another.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Trapper prevent a GI from marrying a call girl who has TB, while trying to help a Korean soldier join his pregnant wife. Radar, of course, provides his usual invaluable help.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee and most of the women in town rally against Andy when he tries to evict a much-beloved butter and egg man.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney comes back from a police auction with a motorcycle and sidecar. After he upsets the whole town with the conveyance, Andy has to find a way to convince Barney to give up the bike.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed thinks that it is time for Jethro to start in the business world, and Jethro decides to become a fry cook and open his own restaurant. Jed is okay with this, but when he tells Drysdale, he is unsure because he is afraid of losing some of the Clampett money. The banker does end up buying Jethro a place on Restaurant Row, but the building is a wreck, with rent only thirty-five a month. Jethro is just glad to have a place of his own.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is pleased when asked to be one of three busboys for a visiting colonel. But his attention is turned to the officer's sad little daughter, who is lonely and needs a playmate.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to use a propaganda radio announcer to get information to the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: What Time Does The Balloon Go Up?
programme.desc: A basket-weaving and a kite-flying contest are part of Hogan's plan to transport an agent to England in a balloon.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Family, Carol plays Eunice, who is determined to star in a local production, despite lacking the talent of her drama teacher.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Bartered Bikini
programme.desc: Wally Dunbar seeks Mason's help in securing ownership of his new summer line of swimwear, but the sketches are stolen and, worse yet, chief designer Rick Stassi is murdered.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Having had a little too much to drink the night before, a young couple wakes up in a strange house in a strange town called Centerville, a place where no one lives, the trees are props and the food is plastic.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A little boy's hobby of growing mushrooms in his cellar turns into a nightmare.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A businessman is responsible for a death when he refuses to allow a truck to pass him on a narrow road.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A drug dealer and his gang take several hostages, hoping to force Mannix to locate and retrieve another gang member who betrayed them. Mannix fears someone's going to die no matter what he does.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Reverend" Will can heal the sick by the power of faith. Or can he? Either way, his "powers" won't keep a witness to murder from coming forward, and that means... another murder.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A husband kills a man he thought was his wife's lover.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are screening applicants for the Police Academy. One seems to have all the right qualifications, except that six months are missing from his application.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: More than $100,000 has been embezzled from an industrial company. An investigation of the employees leads Friday and Gannon to a habitual gambler.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed search for a six-year-old boy who was apparently abducted while walking home from school, and later fear that an elderly witness's wildly inaccurate account may actually pertain to a different crime. They also respond to a barking dog complaint and become suspicious of the dog's owner, mediate a domestic dispute caused by a husband's obsession with watching football, respond to a very creative college prank and pursue armed robbery suspects through a crowded train depot with the aid of a police helicopter.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed becomes preoccupied with the well being of a friend, an electrical engineer by profession, who has just qualified as a reserve police officer and has the bad luck of drawing Officer Wells as his partner. On patrol, Reed and Malloy help out a group of distrusting young adults who are planning to illegally camp in a public park after a rock concert, pull over a young couple in a stolen car and aid wells and the reservist in the foot chase of a heavily armed man who has been coercing innocent strangers into committing bank robberies.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill braves a treacherous hike with the illusory help of Toony."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has his fortune read by a machine and becomes convinced nothing but good luck is headed his way. However, he doesn't feel that way when Larry sets it up so that Beaver will have to fight a 5th grader, Sonny Cartwright.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward loans Beaver 25 cents but gives him a dollar, expecting 75 cents as change. However, Larry manages to convince Beaver to loan him the 75 cents. When Larry doesn't pay him back when he said he was going to, a feud erupts.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Libelous Locket
programme.desc: A dance student is charged with murder when her instructor is found dead after they had a physical altercation.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock tries to figure out whether the archbishop was meant to die in a plot involving an ex-football player, his wife, her lover and the mafia.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie is kidnapped and Virgil believes that Tom Dugan is involved.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The family sets up their cousin Cody, a 64-year-old bachelor, on a date with Cordelia Hunnicutt

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Clay Young is trying to evict Josh Nolan. Josh tells Matt he paid Clay for the property. Clay denies it."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Andy Travis shoots a guy. Matt tells him you're real good with the gun, but you have a choice either put it down or you will have to constantly prove yourself."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A visit by the Cartwrights' spoiled Eastern cousin disrupts life at the Ponderosa.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's uncle, Johnny Gibb, a big-time rodeo rider, comes to visit. While Mark idolizes his uncle, Lucas discovers that Johnny is on the run from the law for an Express Office robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Judge Burton seeks "justice" against the hangman who hanged his son; the judge who sentenced his son; and Lucas, the man who caught his son. When Judge Burton discovers that Lucas has a son, he decides that the best way to serve justice is an eye for an eye, a tooth for a tooth, a son for a son.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "With Hawks ill and Comanches threatening to attack, an Army troop meets up with the wagon train. The Indians appear to greatly outnumber the soldiers, so to give the train hope the troop's lieutenant falsely tells Hale and Coop that there is also a relief column headed their way. Complicating matters even more, a sergeant from the troop recognizes Clay Shelby, a young man on the wagon train traveling with his pregnant wife, as a deserter from back in the Civil War whom he blames for the death of his brother."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A man with chest pains is trapped on a ferris wheel. A child ingests an illegal pesticide. While making a TV appearance to discuss fire prevention, Gage and DeSoto become stars of a real-life emergency.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp prepares for a visit from General MacArthur. Klinger dresses as the Statue of Liberty as the General's jeep drives through the camp. MacArthur is so impressed, he salutes!

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: On payday, Frank buys two sets of pearls, a cheap imitation one for Margaret and a real one for his wife. After some talk, Radar gets Hawkeye $3,000 in lost earnings, Hawkeye gives it to Mulcahy for the orphans, but then the army wants the money back. Trapper wins big at poker after using Hawkeye's watch as a stake, so Hawkeye takes his winnings and gives them to the army to avoid a stay in the honeymoon suite of The Stockade Hilton.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Flagg blows into camp trying to obtain penicillin to barter for information. But Flagg comes down with appendicitis, and the only penicillin he gets is in the keister.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Henry finally gets his discharge. While he is tying things up, Burns prepares for his new command. Henry bids a tearful adieu, but not before Klinger turns up in an outrageous tropical outfit.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to make a silk purse out of a sow's ear when he takes it upon himself to turn Ernest T. into a presentable gentleman. The big test comes at Mrs. Wiley's weekly reception, at which Andy passes him off as his cousin.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis has Mayberry worried when he buys a car.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is still hoping to marry burlesque dancer Chickadee Laverne, and she is still hoping for a dance engagement from the Clampetts. Chickadee returns to the mansion, making Jethro very happy. However, her plan to show them her new act, Little Red Riding Hood, goes haywire thanks to a meddling raccoon.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: "Carter becomes the star of a documentary about the Marine Corps."

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Lebeau And The Little Old Lady
programme.desc: LeBeau tells the others he is taking messages to a little old lady, when really she is a beautiful lady he has fallen for.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: How To Escape From Prison Camp Without Really Trying
programme.desc: Hogan hides 30 prisoners in order to keep the SS busy while the Allies build reinforcements.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Went with the Wind, Carol and the gang parody the classic "Gone with the Wind", with Carol playing Scarlet O'Hara.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Artful Dodger
programme.desc: Allen Sheridan has more enemies than you can shake a stick at, even though he's due to inherit the healthy sum of $162,000. When Allen turns up dead his killer could be anyone, but his cousin, Sarette, becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A restaurant is specialized in "serving" its costumers very well.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A Southerner is about to be hanged for attempting to destroy a bridge vital to the Union's advance.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is hired by former crime boss Sam Dubrio when his daughter is kidnapped. His plan is to set up a ransom and then pay off the pickup man to turn in his boss.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A young dancer who teaches at a lonely hearts club winds up dead. One of his clients hires Cannot to find out who killed him. It isn't long before Frank discovers the dancer was also a con man who had bilked several women out of their life savings. And that lengthens the list of suspects considerably.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby tries to determine if a psychic had anything to do with a lawyer's death.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are on a mission to bolster community relations when a young and slightly militant black man barricades himself in his apartment rather than submit to a traffic warrant.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon appear on a TV panel. The topic: "The Police—Who Needs Them?"

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: A rash of purse snatching leads Malloy and Reed to investigate a motorcycle gang. Determined to convince the gang he has not prejudged them, Malloy challenges their leader to a motocross duel at Indian Dunes.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy finds himself attracted to the new girl in the steno pool, and decides to ask her on a date after learning she's Officer Wells' 25-year-old niece. Out on patrol, he and Reed investigate a report of a prowler in a heavily wooded neighborhood, make a deal with a flower vendor before booking him for unpaid tickets, engage in a high-speed pursuit with a green corvette and investigate a suspicious gardener.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Two generations face off in the third edition of Rival of the Ages."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver buys a common magic trick but is disappointed by everyone's "that's nice" reaction. He gets a totally different reaction out of Bengie, however, when Larry and Beaver convince him that Beaver has been turned into a rock.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June's birthday has Wally and Beaver fighting over what to buy with the $5 dollars that Ward gave them. Wally buys her a wallet while Beaver buys an ugly blouse that June kindly thanks him for, but she has a hard time bringing herself to wear it.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Two-faced Turnabout
programme.desc: When a Balkan dictator with ties to an American businessman dies, the race is on to destroy papers belonging to him that may implicate the businessman in corruption.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When radio disk jockey, and Michelle's new boyfriend, Arthur Saxon is accused of murdering a rival, Matlock agrees to defend him. Michelle swears he's the kindest, most gentle man she's ever known, but Matlock soon learns otherwise.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: After being released by his captors, the chief discovers that his abduction is part of a plot to assassinate a visiting civil rights leader.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A band of gypsies are traveling through Walton's Mountain when they become stranded

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "A buffalo hunter, Jase Murdock, is warned by Ross the storekeeper to stay out of Indian Territory."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "After two bullies cut off Chen's pig-tail (queue), the man vows vengeance."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe falls for a girl whose filled with stories of her absent father and his many adventures.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an Italian count arrives in North Fork, his strange attire attracts the attention of Groder, a town bully. Groder, trying to have fun with this stranger, destroys some of the count's currency, mocks him and tries to humiliate him. Eventually the count challenges Groder to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Floyd Doniger comes to North Fork, looking to start a new life. He's got a steady job as the guard at the new bank and he's entertaining ideas of settling down on a spread of his own.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "A little girl, crying each night, appears to be a ghost from The Donner Party. Many people hear her, but she appears each night to Charlie, who questions his own sanity."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Captain Stanley freaks out when he learns one of his past captains is now his Battalion Chief, causing the others to worry about his increased paranoia. Two men’s carelessness starts a fire at a gas station. A new hospital administrator causes problems. A woman accidentally shoots her husband with a nail gun. Two clowns start a fight at an ice rink. A car leaves an overpass and crashes into a transfer truck filled with pesticides.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "Trapper is shipped home while Hawkeye is on R&R. Hawkeye speeds to Kimpo with Radar to catch Trapper's plane, but they just miss him. While they are there, they pick up BJ Hunnicut and take him back to camp. On the way back, BJ is introduced to the Korean War. "

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Trapper is shipped home while Hawkeye is on R&R. Hawkeye speeds to Kimpo with Radar to catch Trapper's plane, but they just miss him. While they are there, they pick up BJ Hunnicut and take him back to camp.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank settles in as commanding officer, only to have a new one appointed over his head, one that, to his chagrin, fits in very well.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: It happened one night: freezing cold, an artillery barrage that's coming too close, a patient going downhill and Frank's searching Hot Lips' tent for his letters.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer's singing voice surprises everyone, especially Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Weaver's Department store is being robbed, presumably by shoplifters. Barney poses as a mannequin to catch a thief.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After seeing the pool man putting chlorine in the pool, thinking it is poison, and getting a letter they are overdrawn, the Clampetts think that they are broke and Drysdale is trying to get rid of them. However, this is all a misunderstanding, since the letter Jed got was meant for another J.D. Clampett, Jake, who is an out-of-work actor. When Jake gets Jed’s letter, he takes advantage of the notice that he has $36 million dollars, buying a new car and other things.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer tries to repay the $40 he received at a pay phone to the phone company, but gets arrested instead.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tries to keep a fortune in paintings from winding up in the collection of a general.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to send German defenses to the wrong target by "giving" Schultz ESP so that the Allies can bomb an important target.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Slave Ship, a carpetbagger stages a revolt against the tough gallery master. Then, in Her Majesty and the Mob, Queen Carol announces a 128 percent tax increase to the locals.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lucky Legs
programme.desc: Marjorie Cluny wins a contest for best-looking legs sponsored by Frank Patton of Stellar Productions. Her prize is a trip to Hollywood and a role in Patton's next picture. Unfortunately, there was fine print in Marjorie's contract that she didn't read.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A heartless CEO completely automates his factory, laying off all of his employees.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A teacher gets too involved in the life of one of her students.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A vulnerable man is pinned with a murder he did not commit.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.sub-title: Skid Marks On A Dry Run
programme.desc: People begin to be killed off after Mannix is hired to drub up information that could hurt a politician's chances of being elected governor.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Kathy Ackers hires Cannon to find out why her father, a banker, committed suicide at a Caribbean resort. She thinks he was murdered, and wants Cannon to prove it. But the man was embezzling from his own bank, so maybe he did have a motive to kill himself...

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a jewel heist is robbed of his gems, his spouse and his life by his own lawyer.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Cases: an abandoned baby; a teenager on drugs.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday grapples with the Uncle Tom syndrome in selling ethnic groups on police careers.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While on duty in a rural area, Reed and Malloy request the assistance of the DEA to build a case against the smug pilot of a light plane whom they suspect is involved in a drug smuggling operation.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed transport an unconscious 8-year-old boy to Rampart General Hospital and help him and his parents cope with the ordeal. Afterwards, they assist a child welfare hotline operator locate a 15-year-old girl who has intentionally overdosed on pills, and then race to find the boy they brought in earlier after he escapes from the hospital.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony look at some of the biggest cons and conartists of all time!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver wants to raise chinchillas and begins building a cage in the garage. However, when Beaver changes his mind, Ward tries his best to get Wally and Beaver to clean up the mess. Things get worse when Ward unknowingly runs over some of the wood and nails left laying around with the car, causing the boys to try to patch a flat tire before Ward finds out.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: While Beaver is staying at the Mondellos, Larry sneaks a peak at his sister's diary and his mother discovers him and yells at him right in front of Beaver. This prompts Larry to run away to Beaver's house, where Beaver secretly hides him in his bathroom.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Surplus Suitor
programme.desc: After a wealthy heiress' uncle is found dead, she is charged with the murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When an actress is murdered, Matlock represents her director in a community theatre play—on the grounds that Matlock won't be cut from his role in the production!

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil struggles to help Althea after she is raped by a fellow teacher. Darnell does not think they can get a conviction because the man's wife has given him an alibi. Virgil tries to control his anger - until the man returns to intimidate Althea. And Gillespie tries to convince the wife to tell the truth.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The validity of the Waltons' claim to their land is questioned when they cannot produce a legal deed to the property.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Old-timer Smith is a former Army officer considered a butcher. He arrives in Dodge City spreading rumors about the new Banker, Drew Holt."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Chester is concerned when his nomadic and "uncivilized" brother pays a Christmas visit to Dodge, but Magnus Goode proves worldlier and more adaptable to town life than anyone thought possible."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss tries to help an alcoholic poet stay on the wagon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Rebecca Snipe is returning to North Fork after a long visit away. Upon her arrival, Mark is smitten with her and gets it in his head to play matchmaker between her and his pa.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tiffauges, a wealthy and sadistic Frenchman who is used to getting whatever he wants, decides he wishes to purchase the McCain Ranch. Tiffauges' lead man, Xavier, proclaims Lucas to be muy macho, and does not believe Lucas will give in so easily.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Charlie has finally found someone else who shares his dream of man being able to fly, henpecked inventor Hector Heatherton, who has been working on an idea for building a flying machine so Charlie volunteers to build a machine for Hector."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A sporadic electrical short plagues the squad but Roy and John are convinced they can fix it. A back-to-nature couple is ordered to cut back on their shrubbery; the wife is discovered to have a variant of anthrax. The paramedics rescue a man trapped at the top of a tower.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Hawkeye's father is notified that he's dead, he finds it's no easy matter either to get word to him or to establish otherwise.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Its quid pro quo at the 4077th: two bottles of Scotch for secret surgery, and a tank to scare off snipers for an unauthorized shot of penicillin.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Driving back from a medical conference, Radar, Hawkeye, B.J., Sherman and Frank find themselves lost. When they decide to turn around, the bus does not want to start. And when Radar goes off in the middle of the night for the latrine, he does not immediately return.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: It's Potter's anniversary. While Potter writes home, Frank and Hot Lips have a wood carving made for him, and Radar rescues a horse and makes him a present of it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A grumpy Andy agrees to take a few days off and heads up to the lake to relax. Barney and Gomer are in charge, and manage to capture (and lose) an escaped convict who hides in the same woods where Andy just happens to be.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer is convinced that Andy saved his life by putting out a small fire at the filling station. He then begins to repay Andy by becoming his servant.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jake and Opal Clampett are continuing to stay at the Clampett mansion, and Elly and Jethro are more than happy to serve them. But Granny isn’t impressed by Jake at all, and isn’t even sure if Jake is related to Jed. Jethro and Elly both decide they want to get into the movie business, and the two get help from Jake and Opal. Jethro turns into a Marlon Brando-type and Elly fancies herself a glamorous movie star, taking the name Venus Adore.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Clara and Andy get everyone in Mayberry to promise to pledge money for a new church organ, no one wants to pay up when the pledges come due.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets a stray chimpanzee to deliver radio parts to the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: After Hogan mines a bridge, he learns that a truck of Allied prisoners would be the first to cross it and a new plan is born which includes a flaming arrow from Sioux Indian Carter, aka Little Deer Who Goes Swift And Sure Through Forest.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Mary, Mary, Quite Contrary, Quite Contrary, Carol and the gang parodies "Mary Hartman, Mary Hartman". Then, in Do Not Disturb, a dog-tired Tim just wants to sleep, but his noisy neighbors fight next door.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Violent Village
programme.desc: On a fishing trip in a small Sierra Nevada town with his old friend, Sheriff Gene Norris, Mason gets sidetracked into a murder case when Phil Beecher returns from jail.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer searches for an authentic folk song.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man's dream of wealth takes form when he learns of a treasure buried in the mountains.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A South American native helps his boss' wife when it's evident that she needs a shrink.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When an old flame is found dead, Mannix is named the prime suspect.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Private eyes so rarely get a vacation free of peril, and Cannon is no exception. He goes fishing, little knowing that someone from his police past is hunting him: a murderer determined on revenge for the time he spent in prison.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates a plane crash that resulted in a corporation president's death.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Martin Luther King's assassination sends Friday and the Emergency Control Center into action.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives crack down on wildcatters—freelance tow-truck drivers who victimize motorists.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After completing a hazardous driving refresher course, Sgt. MacDonald assigns Malloy and Reed to a nighttime undercover bicycle patrol to test Officer Wells' idea on how to deal with a rash of residential car break-ins. The next day, they pull over a hippie with an obnoxious passenger, and then put their refreshed driving skills to the test when called to a burglary in progress at a new car showroom.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed puts his reputation on the line when he decides to file a formal complaint against a fellow officer after witnessing him use excessive force. On patrol, he and Malloy search for suspects in two separate robberies.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "It's Pi Day! Bill signs up for a trial that makes him a super genius... or something like that."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A pet fair at school has Beaver feeling left out because he doesn't have a pet, but he tells everyone he does, a parrot. Meanwhile, Ward tries to find a pet for Beaver and buys him a hamster.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: An upcoming test in history, Wally's weakest subject, has Wally studying all weekend and has Larry and Eddie coming up with a plan that will give them good grades on the test.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Golden Oranges
programme.desc: Mason goes to the dogs when his defense of a murder suspect hinges on a surprise witness—a dog named Hard Tack. It seems as though Hard Tack holds the key to the murder of a developer who planned to bulldoze orange groves.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Police Officer Jim Shanley is found dead, Sergeant Jerry Reese is charged with the crime. Everyone thinks he's guilty, especially Shanley's partner. In defending Reese, Matlock begins to realize that an old cop buddy of his isn't the man he used to be.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A beauty contest is marred by blackmail and the ambitious mother of a contestant.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: When Verdie Grant learns her daughter is graduating from college, she feels embarrassed by the fact that she never learned to read or write.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Lucy also professes her love for handsome Booth Rider, and concocts a scheme in which Ephram is the intended victim. Booth becomes the unwitting pawn in a homicide that culminates in an ironic twist of fate."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Doc is so angered by a traveling medicine man and his opium elixir that he wants to get a gun and shoot him. When a fellow comes to town trying to kill Professor Lute Bone because his father died drinking his elixir, Bone decides that it's time to give up the patent medicine business."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben tries to bring an estranged father and son back together.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Willard is filling in as temporary marshal while Micah is away. Some Texas cowhands are in North Fork looking for some fun and relaxation, but Dan keeps coming down hard on them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark, returning from selling their herd, share the stagecoach trip with a Marshal and his prisoner, Johnny Cotton. Johnny's gang arrives to free their partner and steal the contents of the stage's strongbox, as well as Lucas' money and rifle.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "While out looking for water Coop and Charlie are stopped by a gang of five, including two women, who are on the run after robbing a bank and killing three lawmen. The leader of the gang shoots Charlie after tying him up, and they take Coop to lead them through a mountain pass to get to California."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy's mother-in-law is scheduled for her annual visit. A car runs into the back of a truck. Drs. Brackett and Early argue over attending a convention in Acapulco. An elderly man becomes ill from drinking a quack’s remedy. When a fire breaks out in a hospital room, the occupant goes into cardiac arrest. A boy’s model rocket sparks a house fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th plays host to kids bombed out of their orphanage, and at the same time has to deliver a baby and care for battle casualties.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: B.J. writes home to his wife, Peg, reporting Klinger's escape attempts, the visit of a formidable chaplain and one of Frank's goof-ups.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye tangles with a tough Army colonel, Colonel Spiker; B.J. helps Zale, who's received a Dear John letter; and Frank looks endlessly for Korean saboteurs.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank has a fever and makes a will, leaving all his money to his wife and all his clothes to Hot Lips.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, in a flurry of cost-cutting measures, saves money on beef by buying a whole side of it. Unfortunately, this happens at the same time her freezer breaks.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy finds himself embroiled in a strange backwoods divorce ritual, ending up as the object of Charlene Darling's affections.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May makes a pet out of the Thanksgiving turkey Drysdale gives the family, making it impossible for "Herman" to be killed. And to celebrate in her own way, Mrs. Drysdale organizes a picture to represent the first Thanksgiving, enlisting two actors portraying Native Americans. But when they head over to the Clampetts' mansion to get the turkey for the picture, Elly and Granny think they are being attacked.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer wins a vacation for two to Las Vegas and Sgt. Carter joins him. Gomer doesn't want to gamble as much as he wants to see the sights, but the sergeant is committed to gaming.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Clearance Sale At The Black Market
programme.desc: After seeing something he shouldn't have, Schultz is ordered to the Russian front.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan leads Klink to believe a rabbit trap is a secret electronic device in order for Klink to bring an electronics expert, who wants to defect, to camp.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Kitchen Commercials, Carol and the gang parody classic kitchen commercials. Then, in Fire At Will, Private Tim can't detonate the cannon successfully. Finally, in The Comic, Carol cheers up her comedian husband by heckling him.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Frantic Flyer
programme.desc: A double cross, a double murder, a plane crash, missing money and an innocent widow charged with crimes she didn't commit are the elements of this case.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two people in a remote cabin find signs of an extraterrestrial.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: When a man is murdered, suspicion falls on his daughter's suitor.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man has an interesting way of making a small fortune.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: After inheriting the original manuscript of the first chapter of Marx's "The Capital," Lisa Ralph turns up murdered.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon takes on a missing person's case which leads to the death of a policeman."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A weekend motorcyclist witnesses a gangster burial, then pays for it with his life.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe, an executive with the C&W Railroad makes a second attempt at shutting the Hooterville Cannonball down.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: General store clerk Herbie Bates is name assistant general manager of the Shady Rest by Kate, making Uncle Joe feel like he is being replaced.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's plan to stop Pearl's yodeling backfires when the police she called find her illegal still.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly shows Granny an article about an old school mate getting engaged after having a coming out party. Granny tells Jed about this, and the clan decides to give Elly May a coming out party. Drysdale isn’t happy about hearing this, especially the spare-no-expense part and seeing the Clampetts’ country decorations. Drysdale decides to get someone to help with the task so the Clampetts don’t embarrass themselves, getting his wife to tend to them.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: Customers Wanted, Abusement Park, Popeye The Sailor
programme.desc: "Popeye tries to lure customers into his penny arcade at Coney Island., Popeye takes Olive to the carnival where he starts demonstrating his prowess on the bell-ringing machine. Bluto appears and proceeds to outdo him., Popeye and Olive Oyl go to a carnival and Bluto follows."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Johann Mouse, Droopy Leprechaun, Million Dollar Cat
programme.desc: "A narrator tells the story of a waltzing mouse who lived in the home of Johann Strauss. Academy Award for Best Short Subject, Droopy gets mistaken for a leprechaun while visiting Ireland., Tom will inherit a million dollars if he doesn't harm any living thing, including Jerry."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: Tree's A Crowd, Musical Moments From Chopin, Pesky Pelican, Billion Dollar Boner, Bugged In A Rug, Fowled Up Party, His Better Elf
programme.desc: "A wealthy estate owneer sends his cat after Woody to stop him pecking at his priceless trees., A Musical Miniature cartoon. Andy and Woody play a flawless Chopin piano concert in a barn, not missing a note even when a horse accidentally sets fire to the barn., Chilly contends with a pelican trying to steal his fishing catch., A man will receive one billion dollars but only if he doesn't harm Woody Woodpecker who won't stop pestering him., Charlie Beary struggles to replace a rug in his family's house., Maggie and Sam find trouble on their way to a Halloween costume party when a dog mistakes him for a real rooster., Woody finds a four-leafed clover that transforms into a small green woodpecker claiming to be a leprechaun named "Clancy." As his three wishes to become rich go awry, Woody realizes this was all a lesson to get him to work to earn a fortune."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Hare Do, Soup Or Sonic, Shamrock And Roll, High Diving Hare, Wearing Of The Grin, Hare Lift
programme.desc: "Elmer Fudd hunts for Bugs with an army surplus wabbit detector but it doesn't seem to work when Bugs leads him off a cliff. , The Coyote chases the Roadrunner all over the desert and ends up tiny. , Merlin the magic mouse and his assistant decide to take a trip to Ireland where they meet a leprechaun. , Sam forces Bugs into a high diving position but unlucky for him Bugs tricks Sam into doing the high dives., Porky Pig is a weary traveler who must stay the night in a foreboding castle. There, the castle's caretaker warns Porky about the leprechauns that roam the grounds tricking wayward travelers. , Bugs takes the 50-cent tour of a giant plane which Sam hijacks and Bugs is forced to fly at gun-point. "

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Jack Of Diamonds
programme.desc: "James and Artemus arrive in Mexico with a present for the Mexican president - a beautiful Arabian horse. However, after their arrival the horse is stolen by a group of outlaw bandits, endangering the relationship between the two countries."

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Hale finds his old flame Chottsie Gubenheimer (played by John McIntire's real-life wife Jeanette Nolan) working in a gambling house and in an argument with the owner, so he asks her to come with him and join the wagon train. He comes to realize that he's getting more problems than he bargained for."

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Gil Anders, once a friend of Heath’s, is ambushed by bounty hunters. The Barkleys hide him, and Jarrod seeks to discover the truth about the crime of which Anders has been accused, despite the fact that Heath believes Anders deserves death.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "When a dishonest Deputy Sheriff takes a prisoner from Matt's jail without Matt's approval or knowledge, Matt and Chester go after the Deputy Sheriff and the Prisoner."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Matt kills a man and his widow posts a $1,000 reward for his death. Everyone in the country from sodbusters to gunslingers is out to get the reward."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Immigrant winemakers decide to plant their grapes on Ponderosa land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Rumson, without even saying to whom he had sold his property, left the bill of sale with the bank and moved away from North Fork. Curge, who's highest offer was upped by $1,000, is upset because Rumson sold out to a "peppergut."

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: When Mushy wins $1,500 from saloon-owner Lorelie Mears, his troubles begin.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin and four others debate what to do after a man falls off a ledge and it is uncertain whether he is alive or dead. Unresponsive and out of reach, the fallen man may be on the receiving end of a mercy killing if no one can find a way to get to him.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall comes to assist a war buddy in his bid for the town's mayoralty, quickly running afoul of the established political machine and its corrupt mayor and sheriff.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Ants In The Pantry, We Want Our Mummy, Boobs In Arms, Baby Sitters Jitters, Sweet And Hot, Yokes On Me
programme.desc: "The Stooges are pest exterminators who drum up business by planting vermin in a ritzy mansion where a party is going on. They are hired, but must pose as guests to work unobserved. , The stooges go to Egypt in search of the mummy of king Rootin-Tootin for which a museum will pay a $5000 prize., Rejected by the armed services, the Stooges decide to "do their bit" by becoming farmers. After paying $1000 and throwing in their car, the boys are owners of a run down farm, which lacks any livestock. After capturing an escaped ostrich, they decide to carve jack-o- lanterns for profit and then must contend with some Japanese who have escaped from a relocation center. The Stooges become heroes by capturing the escapees, with the help of explosive eggs laid by the ostrich who had swallowed some blasting powder. , The Stooges are greeting card salesmen who are mistakenly inducted into the army after escaping from the jealous husband of one of their customers. In boot camp their sergeant turns out to be the same man, whom they constantly vex and bewilder. When the boys are sent to the front lines and the sergeant is captured they must rescue him, which they do after doping themselves with laughing gas. At the end they get shot off into the sunset on a cannon shell. , The Stooges are facing eviction and decide to raise some money by becoming baby-sitters. Their first client is a women separated from her husband, who entrusts her son "Junior" to the boys' care. When the husband steals the baby, the Stooges set out to find their missing charge and return him to his mother. The boys confront the husband and find Junior, and in the process the estranged couple is re-united. , Nightclub performer Larry wants Joe and his sister Tiny to join the act. The only problem is that Tiny is afraid to sing in front of people. They take her to a psychiatrist (Moe) who cures her, and the act is a success. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A professor leads an expedition into the Amazonian jungle to find dinosaurs."

programme.title: House of Svengoolie
programme.desc: "An evil puppeteer targets psychics using his deadly marionettes."

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: A cave boy appears and attempts to lure Penny away, but she refuses and is instead caught in a net. She is transported to an intergalactic zoo, were she will be put on show. Meanwhile Dr. Smith tries to take over the zoo.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: In an attempt to salvage information about a destroyed underwater laboratory, Admiral Nelson and Russian scientist Katya Markhova are swallowed by a whale.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: An escaped convict stumbles across the Spindrift and takes it with him, leaving half the group stranded and the other half trapped inside the ship, as the man falls into quicksand.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: The time travelers find themselves being hunted by Billy the Kid.
